title: Slabs to Blocks: Create Deco
description: A mod that adds various crafting recipes for Create Deco's slabs.
body:
NOTE FOR 1.19.2: You must download the Create Deco .jar file from CurseForge.

This preconfigured mod adds various slab related recipes for Create Deco, allowing you to not go through any config tabs to make the recipes yourself! Here are some examples of what you can do!

![Horizontal Cast Iron Sheet Slabs being crafting into Cast Iron Sheet Metal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b28401a4e0faf2281213429c105d66e131e4fcb.png)
![Vertical Cast Iron Sheet Slabs being crafting into Cast Iron Sheet Metal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d65d6046c2ddcb506dc63f4c167355c4fb305a05.png)
![Vertical Cast Iron Sheet Slabs being converted to Horizontal Cast Iron Sheet Slabs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76070cbee8de006f76d03634e037854a149c3a76.png)
![Cast Iron Sheet Metal being crafted directly into Cast Iron Sheet Vertical Slabs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba2bace7a60060a16c0dc1400c7b1df519ef1aee.png)
